title: Widdop Bambino Silver Plated Little and Loved Keepsake Boxes with Beautiful Gift Box and Pouch - Perfect for Christening or New Parents Gift and Presents - Newborn Keepsake Baby
features: Sentimental Design: Featuring a heartfelt engraving that reads 'Little & LOVED' on the side, this silver-plated keepsake box exudes sentimentality, making it perfect for commemorating special moments.
Durable Construction: Crafted from high-quality silver shiny metal, this keepsake box is built to last, ensuring that your cherished mementos are safely stored for years to come.
Thoughtful Gift: Whether it's for a christening or to celebrate new parents, this keepsake box is a thoughtful and meaningful gift that will be treasured for a lifetime.
Complete Presentation: Arriving in a gift box with 'precious little thing' wording and including a grey pouch for additional storage, this keepsake box is ready to be presented to your loved ones.
Perfect Size: With dimensions of 5.5cm x 5.5cm x 3.5cm, this keepsake box is compact yet spacious enough to hold small treasures, making it ideal for any nursery or home decor.
description: Introducing the Bambino Silver-Plated Little & Loved Keepsake Box by Widdop – a charming and elegant addition to a child’s nursery. The compact and cylindrical design makes it an ideal choice for storing the most precious moments. On the side you'll find heartfelt engraving that read 'Little & LOVED’. The shiny silver-plated exterior enhances the durability and gives this box an attractive look.
